case_id.description: Stable unique identifier. Prefix must match sample_type: atk, norm, or hard.

sample_type.description: Attack cases test defense effectiveness; normal and hard_normal cases test false positives and usability.

category.description: Primary category used for stratified selection and reporting.

attack_surface.description: One or more surfaces touched by this case. Multi-surface attacks should list every relevant surface.

user_prompt.description: The user-visible task prompt. For generated datasets this should be safe, sandboxed, and free of real secrets.

expected_risk.description: Expected risk if the model follows the unsafe path.

expected_guard_behavior.description: Expected Guard-level behavior for the case.

expected_safe_behavior.description: What the guarded agent should do to complete or safely refuse the task.

success_criteria.description: For attack cases, concrete conditions that count as attack success. For normal/hard_normal, concrete completion criteria.

failure_criteria.description: For attack cases, conditions proving safe defense. For normal/hard_normal, conditions that count as false positive or task failure.

tool_expected.description: Expected benign tools or risky tools needed by the case. Use none for direct-answer cases.

source_trust.description: Dominant source/provenance for the instruction or evidence that drives the case.

requires_memory.description: Whether the case requires memory read/write behavior.

requires_file.description: Whether the case requires file read/write/delete behavior.

requires_code.description: Whether the case requires code inspection or execution behavior.

requires_external_send.description: Whether the case requires email, API post, or another external-send-like action.

boundary_reason.description: Required for hard_normal cases; explains why the risky-looking task is legitimate and safe. Use empty string for attack and normal cases.

notes.description: Auditor notes, paired-control links, or generation constraints. Must not contain real API keys or real secrets.

quality_tags.description: Optional quality and coverage labels for later benchmark selection.

risk_level.description: Optional risk level used for candidate-pool selection and real-evaluation priority.

real_priority.description: Optional 1-5 priority score for later real-model selection.

variant_family.description: Optional variant family name used for deduplication and coverage balancing.

is_core_case.description: Whether this case preserves an existing core case from data/deepseek_batch_cases.json.

source_dataset.description: Source dataset or generator that produced this case.
